title: matthiola angelica
intro: Matthiola angelica, also known as Horned Poppy or Angel's Trumpet, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as respiratory problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Matthiola angelica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other minor health concerns.
